description: Letter in Hebrew from Yusuf, a scholar with minimal assets and now in a perilous situation because of debts, dependents, and sureties on his behalf. He requests a donation and prays for his would-be benefactor with the expression, “May you never be ashamed in your life.” (Mark Cohen, Voices of the Poor, 74) EMS
description_he: מכתב עברי מיוסף, חוקר עם מעט רכוש שנקלע לסכנה בשל חובות וערבויות: מבקש תרומה. 'שלא תתבייש בחייך לעולם.'
